description:
The image shows a conceptual diagram illustrating the flow of data or processes in a technical system. It features three key elements arranged sequentially from left to right:

1. A white logo resembling a neural network or AI model on the far left.
2. A black terminal window with a green command prompt symbol (>) in the center, indicating a command-line interface or script execution.
3. A silver database server icon with a purple gem-like shape on top and green horizontal stripes on the right, representing data storage or retrieval.

The background is dark blue with abstract network-like connections, suggesting connectivity or integration between these components. The arrows between the elements indicate a directional workflow, likely depicting how AI/ML models interact with command-line tools to manage or query databases. This image would be relevant for topics such as AI-driven database management, automation scripts, or data pipeline visualization.
